_comment: Example parameter values for lighthouse-offer.json. Customer-side use.
Replace the two GUID placeholders with the values Movate sends you:
- movateApplicationId : the Movate Managed Grafana MI's object ID.
Both come from the outputs of `az deployment group show` against the
managed-grafana.bicep deployment in Movate's subscription — see

mspOfferDescription.value: Grants Movate's Managed Grafana managed identity Monitoring Reader on this resource group's Log Analytics workspace so Movate can render fleet dashboards (metrics + span metadata only; no prompts, no PII). Per ADR 039.
